title: Water Management Interface
tagline: Digital Transformation Platform for Water Refilling Business
description: Developed a full-stack web application using Next.js for client-side and server-side operations, supporting digital transformation of water-refilling business.
Implemented an Express.js backend to enable seamless integration with PostgreSQL database for efficient business record management.
Designed and maintained database schemas to securely store and retrieve operational data, replacing traditional paper and record book systems.
Facilitated the business's transition from manual record-keeping to a streamlined, digital workflow, improving data accessibility and reliability.
